HELIOS Platform - Real-Time Metrics

Last updated: 2026-04-13T05:01:42.7145617-07:00

Owner Start Here

Open the full Owner Start Here guide for the detailed click-by-click setup. Heli0s-dynamics is the enterprise umbrella, M0nado is the GitHub organization / business-product owner, and these steps work even when GitHub Copilot is unavailable.

  1. Start in M0nado.Avatar → Your organizations → M0nado → Repositories → helios-platform → Settings.
  2. Check enterprise policy.Avatar → Your enterprises → Heli0s-dynamics → Policies if any M0nado setting is locked.
  3. Lock down access.Settings → Collaborators and teams. Use M0nado teams and least privilege for all three repos.
  4. Protect source branches.Settings → Rules → Rulesets. Protect main/release branches, require PRs, checks, reviews, and block force pushes.
  5. Reduce Actions permissions.Settings → Actions → General. Default workflow token is read-only; grant id-token only to Azure deploy workflows.
  6. Create environments.Settings → Environments. Add development, staging, production, reviewers, branch restrictions, and scoped Azure variables.
  7. Set up Azure directly.Use Azure CLI/Portal for tenant, subscription, resource groups, OIDC app registration, Key Vault, budgets, and role assignments.
  8. Track branch merges.Projects, Issues, Labels, and Milestones. Separate helios-platform, helios-control, and hermes-fleet-production work.
